Free strategy session

The website build · Kitchen & bath only

A website that turns your visitors into booked jobs.

Most homeowners who land on your site are just looking. I build the site that turns them into the ones who call. You see the whole thing before you pay a dollar.

Schedule your free strategy session →

Every visitor who leaves is a job walking out.

A homeowner lands on your site, feels nothing, and clicks away.

That wasn’t a lost click. That was a kitchen. Twenty or thirty thousand dollars, gone before you knew it showed up.

A few of those a month adds up to tens of thousands a year. It goes to your competitor instead of you.

It’s not your work. It’s what’s speaking for it.

Your work is good. Everyone who has hired you knows it.

The site most contractors get sold doesn’t show it. A pretty brochure. A stock kitchen that was never yours. A template she has already seen on ten other contractors this week.

It makes the best builder in town look like the cheapest. She can’t tell you apart, so she picks the lowest price.

Your site sells for you when you’re not there. Right now it’s costing you jobs.

Most sites only sell to the one already sold.

Ten homeowners land on your site. One is ready to call today. The other nine are still deciding.

Most contractor sites are built for that one. A few photos, a phone number, a form. They do nothing for the other nine.

Those nine are most of the money you could be making.

I build for the nine.

The site shows her the kitchen she has been picturing. It answers the questions she is worried about. It gives her enough proof to stop shopping around and call you.

She lands just looking. She leaves ready to call.

Your best salesman, and it never sleeps.

It sells while you’re on the job. It sells at eleven at night, while she is deciding who to call in the morning.

It never takes a day off. It never works for your competitor.

Your real kitchens in front of her. Reviews from her area. Your number one tap away. It closes her while you’re across town on another job.

It works every day, and you pay for it once.

I build it first. You pay after you’ve seen it.

You’ve paid a marketer up front and got nothing back. Not here.

I design your homepage before you owe me a dollar. Your kitchens, your name, the real thing on your screen.

If you like it, I build the rest at one flat price. If you don’t, it cost you nothing.

You can’t lose money on a site you saw before you paid for it.

Two ways to build it. Both see-it-first. Both yours to keep.

Standard

$1,500

The site most shops need. Built to convert, live fast.

  • Five pages: home, services, gallery, about, contact
  • A proven layout that turns lookers into callers
  • Your real kitchens, reviews, and services loaded in
  • Quote form and click-to-call on every page
  • Fast on mobile, where she’s looking
  • Live in about two weeks
  • You see it before you pay a dollar

Custom

$4,500

For the shop that wants to look like the top of the market.

  • A design built from scratch, a look nobody else in town has
  • Every service on its own page, built to rank and convert
  • Full project galleries with before-and-afters
  • Room to sell: your process, your story, your guarantees
  • Financing, online booking, or live chat added if you want it
  • Built so you look like the high-end choice right away
  • You see it before you pay a dollar

Most shops start with Standard. Choose Custom if you’re a high-end shop and your site needs to show it right away.

This page is just the website. Done For You is everything.

A website on its own brings you more jobs. But it only works on the homeowners who already found you.

Done For You is the full package. It includes this same website, plus your Google rebuilt and run every month, a steady stream of reviews, AI search, and the guarantee that more homeowners call or I work for free.

One package, $750 a month, and you own all of it.
